overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval town at sunset. The character moves from narrow cobblestone alleys between stone buildings into a more open town square populated with NPCs, then turns to explore the area as the sky displays dramatic orange and purple dusk colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between tall stone walls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through a narrow cobblestone alley between high stone walls, heading toward a lit tower visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall medieval stone wall with weathered texture running along the left side
tall medieval stone wall with small barred windows on the right side
arched wooden doorway set into the stone wall with heavy timber frame
tall stone tower illuminated by warm sunset light at the end of the alley
wooden scaffolding structure against the left wall with planks and beams

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow enclosed alleyway with high stone walls on both sides. The cobblestone path is dimly lit, with a warm glow from a distant tower visible ahead. The atmosphere is quiet and empty, with wooden doorways and scaffolding visible along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening cobblestone path with grass verges and wooden fences

events.description: encounter with a bearded NPC walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing forward as the path widens, passing wooden fences and grass verges while approaching the open town area

notable_agents.action: bearded man in simple medieval clothes walking past Geralt in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden picket fence running along the right side of the path
grassy area with weeds growing between the cobblestones and the stone wall
half-timbered medieval house with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
wooden planks and barricades lying scattered on the cobblestones

segments.scene_description: The alley opens into a wider path with grass growing along the edges and wooden fences replacing the stone walls. Geralt passes a bearded townsman walking the other way. Timber-framed houses become visible on the left, and wooden barricades lie scattered on the cobblestone path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town square with market stalls and stone buildings

events.description: entering the main town square with multiple NPCs and market structures visible
Geralt slows and stops, then begins to turn around to survey the area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the bustling town square, passing various NPCs and market stalls, then stopping to look around

notable_agents.action: shirtless man sitting on a wooden bench against a building
group of townspeople in medieval clothing walking and conversing in the square

entered.detail: stone building with red tiled roof and arched doorways on the ground floor
wooden market stall with canvas awning and barrels underneath
large wooden scaffolding structure against a building under construction or repair
stone well or fountain structure in the center of the town square

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges into a wide-open town square filled with NPCs and market activity. Stone buildings with red roofs and timber framing line the square, while a large wooden scaffolding structure dominates one side. The character walks past a shirtless man on a bench and groups of conversing townspeople before slowing to turn around.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square market area with dramatic sunset backdrop

events.description: Geralt turns around and begins walking back through the square, revealing the vibrant sunset sky behind him

agents.ego_description: Geralt turning around and walking back through the town square, passing close to various NPCs including a woman and child

notable_agents.action: woman in a simple blue dress walking past Geralt
child in blue clothing running past in the foreground

entered.detail: vibrant orange and purple sunset sky visible above the town buildings with dramatic clouds
wooden market stall with thatched roof and hanging goods for sale
tall stone church spire silhouetted against the orange sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns to face the camera, revealing a breathtaking sunset sky of orange and purple hues behind him. He walks back through the square, passing a woman in a dress and a running child. Timber market stalls and a distant church spire are silhouetted against the dramatic evening sky as the character continues to explore the medieval town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic stone alleyway into a vibrant, open town square bathed in the glow of a dramatic sunset. It begins with Geralt navigating a narrow, dimly lit path enclosed by high stone walls and wooden scaffolding, moving toward a warm light in the distance. As the alley opens, the stone walls give way to wooden fences and grassy edges, leading the character past a bearded townsman and scattered barricades. The scene then expands into a wide town square bustling with NPCs and market activity, where the camera follows Geralt past timber-framed buildings and a large scaffolding structure. Finally, the character turns to face the camera, revealing a breathtaking sky of orange and purple hues that silhouettes the market stalls and a distant church spire as he explores the medieval town.
